_comment: Use Case: Python codebases using pytest, ruff, mypy, and black.
- No dependency installation permitted (use a pre-approved venv)
- Test runner, linter, and formatter are pre-installed in the project venv
- Project does not contain inline secrets (enforce via pre-commit + gitleaks)
Copy this file to your project root at .claude/settings.json
This file EXTENDS the base deny-list — it does not replace it.
The managed_settings.json deny-list always takes precedence.
rules: PROJECT CONTEXT: You are assisting with a Python project. Your permitted actions are: reading Python source files, running the pre-installed test suite, linter, type checker, and formatter. You must not install packages, modify pyproject.toml dependencies, or run any command not in the allow-list without explicit human approval.
VENV POLICY: The project virtual environment is pre-approved and pre-provisioned. You must not create, modify, or delete virtual environments, nor run pip install under any circumstance.
TEST RUNNER POLICY: You may run tests but you must report failures and propose fixes — you must not automatically modify test files to make tests pass without human review of the proposed change.
